description:
crates/integral-core/src/device.rs has zero test coverage despite being the
critical state machine that handles:
- Incoming DT1 message routing
- Echo suppression timing
- Throttled outgoing message queuing
- Mixer state updates for all 16 parts

Fix: Add tests for:
- State transitions on DT1 receipt
- Echo suppression window (messages within 150ms ignored)
- Throttle enforcement (40ms between sends)
- Out-of-range part index handling
- Concurrent access patterns
title: Add device.rs unit tests
